## Summary

Describe the hardware, documentation, or firmware-support change.

## Review Area

- [ ] PCB / schematic
- [ ] INAV target or firmware notes
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Safety / bring-up notes

## Checks

- [ ] I reviewed the safety notes in `SAFETY.md`.
- [ ] I linked screenshots, logs, or schematic references where useful.
- [ ] I kept the change focused and reviewable.
